en.welcome:
Welcome to Draybot! 🚖🤖
The future generation of ride-sharing and delivery is now with you in a click 💯
en.notRegistered:
You are not registered yet.
To register, click here 👇
en.menu_welcome:
Welcome to TravelBot! 🚗
What would you like to do?
en.driver_already_registered: You are already registered as a driver. If you need to update your information, please contact support.
en.registrationStepName: What is your first and last name?
en.registrationStepVehicle:
Now send me in one message:
Vehicle type, model, and year
For example👇:
Hyundai Sonata 2019 

Do you have two vehicles? You can list both in one message. For example👇:
Hyundai Sonata 2019, Mitsubishi Outlander 2015
en.registrationStepDob:
Now, please send me your foreign date of birth in this format: dd/mm/yyyy
For example: 01/04/2023
en.registrationStepCategory:
3️⃣ Select a vehicle category from the list 👇
Draybot | Registration
en.registrationStepCategoryOptionsFooter: You must tap to select an item
en.categoryStationWagonDescription: A vehicle with a large cargo area
en.category4SeatsDescription: A regular vehicle with 4 seats excluding the driver
en.categoryMiniDescription: A vehicle with 6 seats excluding the driver
en.categorySpaciousMiniDescription: A vehicle with 6 seats excluding the driver - spacious
en.category8SeatsDescription: A vehicle with 8 seats including the driver
en.category9SeatsDescription: A vehicle with 9 seats including the driver
en.category10SeatsOrMoreDescription: A vehicle with ten seats or more
en.registrationStepClothing: 5️⃣ Choose a type of clothing from the options menu only 👇

en.registrationStepVerification:
✅ Registration card sent successfully
⏳ Please wait for system verification and approval
en.name: Name
en.supportMessages:
🧰 Do you have a question or a problem with the process?
You can contact us for support directly on WhatsApp 👇
en.driverApprovedMessage:
*✅ Registration approved*

*✅ You received a free one-week trial 🥳*

🤔 *Which type of bot would you like to use?*

*1️⃣ Regular Bot - without WhatsApp connection*

🟢 Includes:
✅ Receiving rides
✅ Unlimited search
🔴 Does NOT include:
❌ Sending 'T' to groups
❌ Sending 'T' in private
❌ Sending free text
*💸 Price: only ₪29 per month!*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*2️⃣ Premium Bot - with all powerful features*

🟢 Includes:
✅ Receiving rides
✅ Unlimited search
✅ Sending 'T' to groups
✅ Sending free text
✅ Sending 'T' in private
*💸 Price: only ₪49 per month!*
en.driverRegularMessage:
*✅ You have joined the Regular Bot*

*✨ What does the bot include?*

🎯 | *Receive rides with one click*
📍 Get rides that match you instantly with a single click

🔍 | *Unlimited ride search*
🔄 Quickly search by city or destination

🌐 | *All rides in one place*
📌 Everything is sent to you – never miss a ride

👨‍💻 | *Fast and personal support*
🛠️ Quick response for any question

💬 *For questions and support:* 053-7276221
en.driverRegularMessageConnected:
*✅ You are connected!*

To start searching for rides – type:
P + the city you are currently in 🕵️‍♂️
For example: P Bnei Brak

🔎 Get an updated list of rides from your area
🚗 Choose a ride and hit the road – no waiting
en.driverPremiumMessage:
*✅ You have joined the Premium Bot!*

*✨ What does the bot include?*

🎯 | *Receive rides with one click*
📍 Get rides that match you instantly

📤 | *Send 'T' to group via the bot*
📨 Send 'T' to the group – no manual typing

✏️ | *Send free text to group via the bot*
📝 Send any message quickly with one click

📩 | *Send 'T' in private with one click*
📬 Send the dispatcher a message privately

🔍 | *Unlimited ride searches*
🔄 Quickly search by city

🌐 | *All rides in one place*
📌 Everything sent to you – without missing out

👨‍💻 | *Fast and personal support*
🛠️ Quick responses for any question

*💬 For questions and support:* 053-7276221
en.driverContinueMessage:
🤲 | One more little thing and we're done...

To complete the initial installation process, you must now connect WhatsApp to Bigbot
Now click on "Connect" and connect according to the instructions
en.driverConnectWhatsappMessageNotConnected:
📡 | The Wattsap connection to Drivot 

❌ Status: Disconnected 

💡 Drivot operates through the watsap connection to the system through the "Related Devices" in the Wattsap app. 

To connect, the following steps should be performed.
en.driverConnectWhatsappConnectInstruction:
📋 A few simple steps and you are connected:

1️⃣ *Copy text code*: Copy the code sent immediately in a separate message.

2️⃣ *Linked devices*:
Log in to WhatsApp > Click on the 3 dots > Select "Linked devices".

3️⃣ *Connection*: Select the "Connect via phone number" option.

4️⃣ *Paste*: Paste or type the code you received in the appropriate field.
en.driverConnectWhatsappMessageErrorTooMany: There were too many attempts to link a device, please try again later
en.driverConnectWhatsappMessageConnected:
🎉 Connection successfully completed!

The bot is now connected to your WhatsApp account and will perform a regular scan of groups according to the settings.
You can now start receiving notifications and personalized trips 🚗

en.menuLocationRidesDescription:
Go to main menu for rides in your location
Quick shortcut: P
en.menuLocationRidesMessage:
📘 Instructions for use – BigBot
━
🚗 How to get started?
To receive trips – send according to the example:

🔹 P book – to receive trips departing from a number
🔹 P book sea – to receive trips from a number to the sea
🔹 P internal to B – to receive trips within B
🔹 P Safed – to receive trips arriving in Safed

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🧹 Deleting searches:
Send one of the following commands:

🗑️ Busy in B book – to delete a specific search
🧾 Summary – to delete several searches
🚫 Busy – to delete all searches

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ Quick tips:
* You can write the letter P in the "free" place
* To return to this menu – send at any stage: P

━
📍 Bigbot – trips at your location
The system that understands you at exactly the right time 💥
en.settingsLocationShareDescription: Share and get an accurate time to pickup point
en.infoVideoHelpDescription: Watch a tutorial video about rides in your area
en.settingsSummarySearchesDescription:
Delete destinations and view all searches summary
Send: Summary
en.settingsFilterGroupsButtonDescription: Filter out groups you don't want to receive rides from
en.settingsFilterGroupsDescription:
🚫 *Blocking Groups in BigBot*

Here you can define groups from which *BigBot* will not pull trips for you.

It is recommended to add groups such as *family / friends / news / updates* where you do not want the system to scan messages.

Once you add the groups here, *BigBot will ignore them and will not scan their content*.

👉 Click here to select the groups you want to block
en.settingsFilterGroupsLabel: Select all groups you would like to filter out
en.settingsFilterCarTypeDescription: Get rides by car type, like minivan etc.
en.settingsFilterWordsDescription: Receive or filter rides based on custom keywords
en.settingsRemoveGroupContentDescription: Automatically deletes all your messages from the groups
en.settingsRemoveGroupContentMessage:
The action is in progress... ⏳
Group cleanup may take several minutes, please be patient
You will receive a message here once the action is completed
en.settingsRemoveGroupContentSuccessMessage:
🗑️ | Message Deletion
✅ Chat cleanup successfully completed in {clearedGroups} out of {totalGroups} groups in your archive
Your WhatsApp is now faster and more secure 😄

BigBot | Group Cleanup
en.profileViewEditDescription: View and edit your details, change car type
en.profileVerificationDescription: Your profile is waiting for verification
en.supportHumanDescription: Feel free to talk to us 24/6
en.supportHumanMessage:
🤝 Need help?  
We're here for any question or issue 💬  
Send us a message and we’ll be happy to assist with anything!

en.vehicleDesignatedNotToAcceptTrips: ❌ | Vehicles designated not to accept trips:
en.vehicleDefinedNotToAcceptTrips: ❌ Vehicles designated not to accept travel:
en.locationShareInstructions:
📍 *How to share your location*

*For iPhone (iOS) users:*
1. Tap the *+* sign in the bottom left corner
2. Choose *Location*
3. Tap *Send your current location*

*For Android users:*
1. Tap the *📎 (paperclip)* icon
2. Choose *Location*
3. Tap *Send your current location*
en.menuClearAllSearchesDescription:
Remove a single search: Tafus Yam B"B
Remove multiple searches: Summary
en.groupsPriorityDescription: Add or remove groups that bypass duplication filtering
en.groupsBlockedDescription: Add or remove groups that you don't want to receive rides from
en.proMenuDescription:
Return to PRO menu
Send: PRO
en.paymentAddChargeDescription: Add a charge to your account
en.paymentCloseAccountDescription: Account will close in 17 days on the 1st of the month
en.secretMenuWelcome:
📦 Secret menu activated successfully

To choose an action – click on "📋 Options":
en.secretMenuAutomaticDestinationDescriptio:
📍 Please write the list of routes you want the bot to detect and perform an automatic action for.

Example (one line per route):  
P Jerusalem Bnei Brak  
P Jerusalem Netanya
en.secretMenuAutomaticDestinationMessage:
Available: {originAndDestination}
✅ Got it! You're free from searching.
🤖 The bot is already on it – searching for trips in the background
📡 and automatically sending messages in the groups.
📬 Once a matching trip comes up – you’ll get a message with all the details.

⏳ In the meantime, sit back and relax – I'm working for you 😉
en.secretMenuAutomaticDestinationFoundRide:
*{body}*

📤 The message was sent to the dispatcher.
⏳ Please wait for approval – once approved, the trip will be sent directly to you.
📲 Be available – it could come at any moment 😉
en.secretMenuEditMessageToPrivateDescriptio:
📝 Please write the default message you want the bot to send in private to the dispatcher when a trip is detected for you.

Example:  
Tesla 2024
en.secretMenuEditMessageToPrivateSuccess:
✅ Message received successfully!  
The text you attached will be automatically sent with every request to the dispatcher.  
📩 Good luck!
en.secretMenuCancelAutomationDescription:
🚫 The automation for sending replies to trips in private to the dispatcher has been deactivated.

You can activate it again at any time through menu 058.
en.stationRegistrationStart: To get started, please click the button below to begin the registration process:
en.stationRegistrationName: 📝 Please enter your *Station Name* (for example: Bnei Brak Central Station)
en.stationRegistrationPhone: ☎️ Great! Now please enter the *phone number that will be used for billing* for the station.
en.stationRegistrationEmail: 📧 We're almost done! Please now send the official *email address* of the station for communication and receipts.
en.stationRegistrationError: ❌ An error occurred while registering the station. Please try again later.
en.stationCodeMessage:
🎫 *Your station code is:* {stationCode}
(Save this code – it is required to register the dispatchers under your station!)
en.stationManageMessage:
🚦 Setting Groups for Sending Rides

Here you can set two different speeds for sending rides from your station:

1️⃣ Normal speed – sending to groups at a relaxed pace.
2️⃣ Fast speed – immediate sending to more groups.

Please choose the speed type you wish to set now:
en.stationManageSpeedSelectGroups1:
📜 Group List

Select from the list the groups for immediate sending (Stage 1).
en.stationManageSpeedDescription2Delay:
⏱️ Please type how many seconds after Stage 1 to send to Stage 2.

Example:
20
en.stationManageSpeedSelectGroups2:
📜 Group List

Select the groups to send to in Stage 2.
en.stationManageSpeedDescription3Delay:
⏱️ Please type how many seconds after Stage 2 to send to Stage 3.

Example:
60
en.stationManageSpeedSelectGroups3:
📜 Group List

Select the groups to send to in Stage 3.
en.stationManageSuccessMessage:
✅ The {speedType} settings have been saved successfully!

You can now also set the fast sending speed if you wish.
en.menuPerformActionsMessage: To perform actions, please choose from the menu

en.dispatcherRegistrationRejected: Your request to join the station was rejected. For more details, please contact the station owner.

en.inviteMessage:
🚀 *BigBot – the bot that helps you catch rides before everyone else!* 🚀

🔥 *Free 1-week trial – limited spots, register now!* 🔥
With BigBot, you stop searching and start getting rides easily and quickly.

✨ *What does the bot offer?*

🎯 | *Get rides with one tap*
Hot rides sent to you in real time

📤 | *Send 'T' to groups via the bot*
Easily request rides in groups

✏️ | *Send free text to groups via the bot*
Quickly send any message you need

📩 | *Send 'T' in private with one click*
Send ride requests in private chats instantly

🔎 | *Unlimited ride search*
Find any ride posted in groups easily

🌐 | *Rides from all groups in one place*
Never miss a ride again

👨‍💻 | *Fast, personal support*
We’re here for any questions

💸 After your free trial week,
the monthly price is only 49 ₪!

✉️ For questions and support: 053-7276221

BigBot Team

👇 *Register now!* 👇

he.driverConnectWhatsappConnectInstruction:

he.settingsFilterGroupsDescription:
🚫 *חסימת קבוצות בביגבוט*

כאן תוכל להגדיר קבוצות שמהן *ביגבוט* לא ימשוך עבורך נסיעות.

מומלץ להוסיף קבוצות כמו *משפחה / חברים / חדשות / עדכונים* שבהן אינך מעוניין שהמערכת תסרוק הודעות.

לאחר שתוסיף כאן את הקבוצות, *ביגבוט יתעלם מהן ולא יסרוק את התוכן שלהן*.

👉 לחץ כאן כדי לבחור קבוצות שברצונך לחסום
he.settingsFilterGroupsLabel: בחר את הקבוצות שאינן רלוונטיות לך
he.settingsFilterCarTypeDescription: קבלת נסיעות לפי סוג רכב, לדוגמת מיניק ועוד
he.settingsFilterWordsDescription: לקבל או לסנן נסיעות לפי מילים בהתאמה אישית
he.settingsRemoveGroupContentDescription: מוחק את כל ההודעות שלך מהקבוצות באופן אוטומטי
he.settingsRemoveGroupContentMessage:
הפעולה מתבצעת... ⏳
ניקוי הקבוצות זו פעולה שעשויה להיעשות לאורך מספר דקות, נא להתאזר בסבלנות
תקבל כאן הודעה ברגע שתושלם הפעולה

✅ ניקוי צ’אטים בוצע בהצלחה ב־{clearedGroups} מתוך {totalGroups} קבוצות בארכיון שלך
כעת הוואטסאפ שלך מהיר יותר, ומאובטח יותר 😄

ביגבוט | ניקוי קבוצות

he.locationShareInstructions:
📍 *איך לשתף את המיקום שלך*

*למשתמשי iPhone (iOS):*
1. לחצו על הסימן *+* בפינה השמאלית התחתונה
2. בחרו באפשרות *מיקום*
3. לחצו על *שלח את המיקום הנוכחי שלך*

*למשתמשי Android:*
1. לחצו על סמל ה-*📎 (מהדק נייר)*
2. בחרו באפשרות *מיקום*
3. לחצו על *שלח את המיקום הנוכחי שלך*

🚦 הגדרת קבוצות לשליחת נסיעות

כאן תוכל להגדיר שתי מהירויות שונות לשליחת נסיעות בתחנה שלך:

1️⃣ מהירות רגילה – שליחה בקבוצות בקצב רגוע.
2️⃣ מהירות מהירה – שליחה מיידית לקבוצות רבות יותר.

בחר את סוג המהירות שברצונך להגדיר כעת:

he.dispatcherRegistrationPendingOwnerApprov: הבקשה נשלחה לבעל התחנה לאישור. נא להמתין.
he.dispatcherRegistrationWaitingConfirm: לאישור הצטרפות לתחנה זו, לחץ על כפתור האישור.
he.dispatcherRegistrationAlreadyRegistered: אתה כבר רשום כסדרן בתחנה זו.
he.dispatcherRegistrationRejected: הבקשה שלך להצטרף לתחנה נדחתה. לפרטים נוספים פנה לבעל התחנה.
he.dispatcherRegistrationError: אירעה שגיאה בתהליך הרישום. נסה שוב או פנה לתמיכה.

he.paymentExpiredMessage:
⏰ היי, נגמר לך המנוי בביגבוט 🚀

אנחנו כאן כדי להמשיך לעזור לך לתפוס נסיעות בזמן שנוח לך, בלי לחפש ידנית ובלי לפספס.

כדי להמשיך ליהנות מהשירות – לחץ כאן לחידוש המנוי לחודש נוסף ב-49 ₪ בלבד 👇

he.inviteMessage:
🚀 *ביגבוט – הבוט שיעזור לך לתפוס נסיעות לפני כולם!* 🚀

🔥 *שבוע ניסיון חינם – מספר המקומות מוגבל, מהרו להירשם!* 🔥
עם ביגבוט אתה מפסיק לחפש ומתחיל לקבל נסיעות בקלות ובמהירות.

✨ *מה יש בבוט?*

🎯 | *קבלת נסיעות בלחיצה*
נסיעות חמות אליך בזמן אמת

📤 | *שליחת ת' לקבוצה דרך הבוט*
שולחים בקשה לנסיעה בקבוצה בקלות

✏️ | *שליחת טקסט חופשי לקבוצה דרך הבוט*
שולחים הודעות חופשיות במהירות

📩 | *שליחת ת' לפרטי בלחיצת כפתור*
שולחים בקשות לנסיעה גם בפרטי – בקליק אחד

🔎 | *חיפוש נסיעות ללא הגבלה*
מוצאים כל נסיעה שפורסמה בקבוצות בקלות

🌐 | *נסיעות מכל הקבוצות במקום אחד*
לא מפספסים יותר נסיעות

👨‍💻 | *תמיכה אישית ומהירה*
אנחנו איתך בכל שאלה

💸 לאחר שבוע הניסיון,
המחיר החודשי רק 49 ₪ *בלבד!*

✉️ לשאלות ותמיכה: 053-7276221

צוות ביגבוט

👇 *הירשמו עכשיו!* 👇
